placements.overview:
Institute for Innovative and Integrated Management Studies (also known as IIIMS) is a premier institute located in Mumbai, Maharashtra. It offers a PGDM programme in 14 specialisations. In addition to this, a paid internship for the duration of 6-8 months is also offered to the eligible students. The institute has a proven record of 90% internship and placement ratio. Institute for Innovative and Integrated Management Studies is approved by the All India Management Association (AIMA) and recognised by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

Candidates are also given rewards for their academic performance through several scholarships. Up to 1 Lakh of scholarship is awarded to the deserving candidates, which depends on the score in the Scholarship Test. Students learn from experienced corporate mentors and industry practitioners to provide quality education.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, bad placements in 2023.

content.Placements: In our college, there were 70 students in our graduating class. Of those, one of my friends got a 4.7 LPA package and went on to work as a software engineer at LG Soft. Others went to startups and some went to foreign countries to pursue higher education.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the classrooms but it is available in the labs. The quality of the labs is good and the college canteen is the best thing about the college. We had a lot of fun there. A little more improvement is needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied due to lack of faculty and not proper classes are held.

content.Placements: Some students got placed in IT industry with the lowest salary package. Wipro, Infosys etc. are the companies visit for placement. Around 99% of students completed internships at different companies like Airobosoft Pvt limited, Zyfer Manglore and many. Designing and software development are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure for labs, classrooms, and library. Some are staying in government hostels and some are in college hostel. Food is not bad at hostel and good medical facilities. In government hostel food is not so expected but still getting every facility provided by government.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with the faculty and facilities of our college.

content.Placements: In our college placements, 5 students got placed in our course. Tata consultancy services, and Capgemini were the top companies that came to our college for recruitment. The college is not very nice to choose from. The hostel and the college are both located somewhere in different locations, and the college is not provided with good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the placements and there is no proper education system.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members.

In this college, only software companies visited in the previous year. Due to the COVID-19, there were no campus placements in the college.

They are friendly, and they explain concepts easily to understand students. Semester exams are not difficult to pass because we study in internal exams. Our branch has 8 faculty members. They are awesome, and we can easily understand the syllabus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall the best college.

content.Placements: At Multani Mal Modi College Patiala, there are not so good placements for their students. Their minimum package of placement is 2 LPA. Placements are only for students of B.Com, BBA, and BCA. 40% of students are shortlisted for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college is too good but in Multani Mal Modi College Patiala, there is no hostel facility but their PG is available near the college for students. The infrastructure of the college is very nice especially the commerce block of the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala, is an average college according to me because only 50% students got placement from this college. The average package students got is 1 LPA. College offers various courses like B.Com, M.Com, etc. Private companies recruit students, roles offered are bank manager and finance manager.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are not well painted, the furniture is good, and all facilities like computer lab, science lab, and maths lab are there in the college. The canteen is below average, the food sometimes tastes bad, and there is not any playground to practice games. Only a tennis court is in the college.

Institute have courses for all 1966 students. For students institute have extraordinary facilities & infrastructure like Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Co-ed Hostel, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

Asra Group of Institutions is a private institute, established in 2009 in Tehsil Bhawanigarh, Punjab. Asra Group of Institutions is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 57 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 15 specialisations such as Agriculture, Anaesthesia, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Digital Marketing. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Full Time mode. Asra Group of Institutions has an annual seat intake of 1966 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Humanities & Social Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: Percentage should be at least 50% for admission. The college provides no placement after the graduation of completing any course. The college is only responsible for the students' academic percentage while pursuing the degree or course they are engaged in.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. The classrooms are comfortable and well-designed from the perspective of infrastructure. The ambience of the college is also quite impressive. Required labs and libraries are available in every department.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure, but staff members are good.

review_content.Placements: The college basically focuses on just providing degrees. So don't expect any type of placement from here. They don't have any relationships with any recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average and doesn't have basic amenities. Buildings for different departments are there, but the college suffers from admissions. So they lack providing good labs, libraries, mess, and canteen. The hostel of the college has no students, so there is no mess. The college also doesn't indulge students in any type of sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it is good for day scholars.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very rare at our college, especially in our course. Only 1-2% of the students got placed on their own by applying to different companies. There was no top recruiting company. Around 30% of the students got internships from our course in web designing and other courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is highly demarcated with labs, a Wi-Fi system, and good infrastructure. For the day scholars, a bus facility is available. The sports ground was very good having synthetic mats. On-campus, there is a canteen providing hygienic food. The hostel building is very nice and had facilities like air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Technology Research and Integrated Institute.

content.Placements: There are only a few students, only 10 to 15. Placements are not very good, however, companies visit the campus and hire students if they meet the qualifications and are clear with their degrees. The average package ranges from branch to branch, but it is generally low, about 2 LPA to 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is big enough to be a good college. There are big labs, lecture halls, and the library is also good. But the building is old and has not been maintained properly. ACs are not working in labs and the library, and the water supply is also not very good. Toilets are absolutely trash. The hostel rooms are good and clean, but bathrooms are not clean, and washbasins are also dirty. The water cooler is not working, the Wi-Fi is not working, the gym is old, and the mess food is of very poor quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College and hostel are away from home.

content.Placements: Placements are average, i.e. 5 LPA-7 LPA. Many companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Tata, Maruti, Internshala, etc., conduct recruitment exams and group discussions for hiring in college. The minimum requirements are like CGPA of 7 or with no backlog and drop year. Some of the companies want above 70% in 12th standard. In our college, in B.Tech the highest package last year was approximately 7 LPA and the average was 3 LPA-5 LPA. If students don't follow the criteria but have skills and knowledge then the companies hire on as internship basis.
content.Infrastructure: The whole college has Wi-Fi coverage but in the hostel, the range can vary. The whole campus is fully air-conditioned and campus area is digital. Classrooms are also air-conditioned and digital like smart boards, projectors, and digital environment. The infrastructure of hostel and college is very good. Nice buildings and proper space for park and playgrounds for cricket and football and indoor games. Hostel fees is Rs. 39,500 per semester in which the rooms, electricity, mess, medical facilities, gym, Wi-Fi, etc., are included. Mess food is average.

review_summary.college_name: University of Kashmir, North Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: An enriching college experience with knowledgeable faculty.

content.Placements: The on-campus placement drive doesn’t usually happen. The job opportunities provided in the on-campus placement drive are very low. Students usually go for off-campus placements. Many seniors have opted for jobs in off-campus placements only. There is not any known rate for the placements of the passouts through this college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and labs are well maintained with new generation computers. The hostel facilities are also available for the students from far-flung areas. Also, there is a canteen and a dispensary for the students inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very bad place to complete your graduation because of the lacking faculty and opportunities.

content.Placements: The university does not have a placement cell, and no companies come to campus for on-campus placements. As a result, there are zero placements, and no students have received high or low packages.
content.Infrastructure: The engineering department is a two-story building with four classrooms and two computer labs. Each classroom has air conditioning and a projector for digital demonstrations. The library is well stocked with the books required for the courses offered on campus. Water filters are provided in every building. The hostel is located about 3 kilometers from the campus and is accessible by a dedicated bus route. The hostel mess is run by students, and the food and cooking areas are hygienic. Unfortunately, there is no Wi-Fi on campus or in the hostel, and the internet connectivity in the area is poor. Finally, there is an on-site general physician, but no sports are played on campus because there is no playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Please do not go to this college; you will regret it.

content.Placements: The placement of North Campus is not good, and there is no proper placement in our college. Our placement cell is not good, and companies like Saras Analytical come to our college, but hire no one. As I talked to seniors, they were just not interested in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Don't talk about the infrastructure; the infrastructure is not good. Only one building has three classrooms, and the classrooms are good, with two ACs in each class and proper technology. But the labs are below average, with old PCs that have no power and are not capable of running basic software.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: If I talk about faculty, it is good, but other things are not as good, for example, placements.

content.Placements: There are not many options for placement. If you are thinking you will get a placement in a big industry, there are limitations. If you want a good placement, you should go to a big university. If you are a top student, you still have chances at Kashmir University.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are average. You should visit and see the hostels yourself. If you think they are good. Then they are, as people have different perspectives. In my view, they are good for a normal student who focuses only on studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good university but lacks a bit in infrastructure.

content.Placements: Very low placements takes place in this campus. You majorly have to do other courses along with it to get a job directly after B.Teach. Because placements are very low these years and do not expect it to get back to normal so its better to do some courses.
content.Infrastructure: Department is good enough for studies and enjoyment. Not that big but sufficient. Three labs are there for each subject. These labs are used from your first sem directly so that you get practical knowledge as well and teachers are also great minded they will help you always.
